overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a cinematic video game showing a character in futuristic gear traversing a dark, rocky wasteland at night. The character walks along ridges and through valleys toward mysterious floating rock structures in the distance, with atmospheric fog and mist creating a moody, desolate science-fiction atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain ridge with tall grass

events.description: character turns left to follow the ridge path, tall grass sways in wind

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a rocky ridge path with a large backpack and glowing equipment

entered.detail: dark jagged rock outcropping on the left side of the path
steep rocky cliff face on the right side
tall thin grass blades swaying in the wind
silhouetted mountain peaks against the cloudy night sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rocky mountain ridge at night, with tall grass swaying on the left and steep rock formations on the right. The atmosphere is misty and desolate, with distant mountains barely visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff edge overlooking valley with floating structures

events.description: massive floating rock structures become visible in the distant valley ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the cliff edge as the terrain opens up to reveal the valley ahead

entered.detail: massive floating rock formations with glowing elements suspended in the sky

segments.scene_description: The character moves along the cliff edge as the camera reveals a vast valley containing mysterious floating citadel structures in the distance. The tall grass disappears as the terrain becomes more barren rock, and the sky opens up overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky valley approaching floating anomaly

events.description: character descends slightly into the valley between rock walls
mist and atmospheric haze thicken as approaching the floating structures

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow valley toward the massive floating rock formations, maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: tall layered rock wall forming the left side of the valley passage
tall layered rock wall forming the right side of the valley passage
smaller rocks and debris floating in the air near the main structures

segments.scene_description: The character descends into a narrow valley passage flanked by tall rock walls, walking toward the massive floating citadel structures that dominate the horizon. Atmospheric mist thickens as the distance to the floating anomaly decreases, with smaller debris visible floating in the air.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate mountain ridge into a narrow valley dominated by massive floating anomalies. It begins with the character walking along a rocky ridge where tall grass sways beside steep formations under a misty, nocturnal haze. As the character moves along the cliff edge, the terrain shifts to barren rock and the sky opens up to reveal a vast valley containing mysterious floating citadel structures in the distance. The scene then transitions as the character descends into a narrow passage flanked by towering rock walls, moving deeper into the landscape. Finally, the atmospheric mist thickens and small debris begins to float in the air as the camera closes in on the massive citadels that now dominate the horizon.
